emails.subject: BP Amoco
emails.body: Hi, Sharon! Have you received my package with the original BP Amoco master netting agreements and, if so, have they been signed? Thanks! Marie

emails.subject: RE: BP Amoco
emails.body: Uh, oh! It was sent to Peter in the interoffice pouch. My assistant said she put it to go on Friday. I sure hope you find it, cause it has original signatures. Please let me know what you find out? Thanks! Marie To: Heard, Marie

emails.subject: BP Amoco
emails.body: BP Amoco Just to let you know I received the documents this morning. Once Rob Milnthorp has signed them, I will let you know when I courier them out to you. Have a great day! Sharon

emails.subject: RE: BP Amoco
emails.body: RE: BP Amoco HALLELUJAH!!!!!!!!! To: Heard, Marie
